title: INTERNAL Error: Attempted to dereference unique_ptr that is NULL
description:
### What happens?

The test case below triggers an internal error in DuckDB's latest source version.

### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 VARCHAR);

SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE(NOT(false = ANY([]))) ORDER
    BY(~((SUM(true) OVER() - SUM(true) OVER())::INT)) ASC;
```

```sh
INTERNAL Error:
Attempted to dereference unique_ptr that is NULL!

Stack Trace:
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 FLOAT, c4 BOOLEAN);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NULL OR c2 IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE t2(c5 INT PRIMARY KEY, c6 VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO t2 (c5, c6) SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Dereferencing NULL unique_ptr in SQL query execution
